candidates.snippet: ntact Blatt . Glyphs Blatt Design Information Smeijers’ Blatt family is a follow-up of Boekblad, a typeface designed in 1993. A reference to it can be found in Smeijers’ second book, ‘Type Now’ (Hyphen Press, London) on
